---
output: html_document
---
<!--Just basic texts with <br> to separate text chunks with extra space but also a .jpg centered on the page.-->

<br>

<p style="text-align:center;"> <img src="ks-pic.jpg" style="width:150px"></p>

<br>

<p style="text-align:center;"> #### Welcome to my website, here you can find my private projects, publications, resume and information about me.

<div style="clear: both"></div>
